title: ‘Seriously stylish in a market crammed with charcoal cuboids’ — I’ve tested tons of power banks but Iniu’s slim, chic MagSafe brick has rapidly become a firm favourite
summary: The Iniu SnapGo Air 10000mAh Power Bank is a svelte, pocketable MagSafe power bank. All told, the Iniu SnapGo Air 10000mAh Power Bank is a pretty strong power bank.
